expectations.text: Warns that lowering the cap alone with swap=0 will stall/freeze at the new boundary rather than fix pressure
expectations.evidence: cap+swap=0 flagged as OOM/stall at boundary

expectations.text: Recommends adding swap before (or together with) lowering the memory cap
expectations.evidence: non-zero swap recommended before cap change

expectations.text: Recommends reducing resident helpers (stale/duplicate node, pyright, MCP workers) as part of the fix
Grounds advice in WSL2 VM behavior (vmmemWSL envelope / MemAvailable), not generic tips
